image:image.image:title: Rain or Shine Roofing hero image — Springfield, OR roofing contractor
image:image.image:caption: Rain or Shine Roofing serves the Eugene-Springfield area, the Willamette Valley, and the Oregon Coast within a 100-mile radius.

image:image.image:title: Rain or Shine Roofing logo
image:image.image:caption: Official logo of Rain or Shine Roofing, Springfield, Oregon.

image:image.image:title: Tim, owner of Rain or Shine Roofing

image:image.image:title: Tim on a roof in Oregon
image:image.image:caption: Tim, lead roofer at Rain or Shine Roofing, on a residential roof in Oregon.

image:image.image:title: Completed Rain or Shine Roofing project in the Willamette Valley, Oregon
image:image.image:caption: Finished residential roof replacement by Rain or Shine Roofing in the Willamette Valley.

image:image.image:title: Finished asphalt shingle roof on an Oregon home
image:image.image:caption: Completed roof installation by Rain or Shine Roofing showing new asphalt shingles on an Oregon residence.

image:image.image:title: Tim, owner of Rain or Shine Roofing
image:image.image:caption: Tim, founder and lead roofer at Rain or Shine Roofing in Springfield, Oregon.

image:image.image:title: Completed residential roof replacement
image:image.image:caption: Finished asphalt shingle roof replacement by Rain or Shine Roofing.

image:image.image:title: Rain or Shine Roofing finished project
image:image.image:caption: Completed roofing job by Rain or Shine Roofing in the Oregon Willamette Valley.

image:image.image:title: Residential red asphalt shingle roof by Rain or Shine Roofing
image:image.image:caption: Finished red asphalt shingle residential roof installed by Rain or Shine Roofing in Oregon.

image:image.image:title: Roofing supplies staged on a residential roof
image:image.image:caption: Roofing materials staged on an Oregon residential roof during a Rain or Shine Roofing tear-off.

image:image.image:title: Commercial roof project in Oregon

image:image.image:title: Rain or Shine Roofing project in the Willamette Valley
